creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: madpilot
Date: Tue Jul 16 12:15:05 2013
New Revision: 323101
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/323101

Log:
  - Update Maintainer address
  - Trim Makefile headers
  
  PR:		ports/180460
  Submitted by:	Anton Shterenlikht <mexas@bris.ac.uk> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/astro/xearth/Makefile
  head/math/slatec/Makefile
  head/textproc/urlview/Makefile   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/astro/xearth/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/astro/xearth/Makefile	Tue Jul 16 12:04:09 2013	(r323100)
+++ head/astro/xearth/Makefile	Tue Jul 16 12:15:05 2013	(r323101)
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@ CATEGORIES=	astro geography
 MASTER_SITES=	http://seis.bris.ac.uk/~mexas/ \
 		LOCAL/madpilot/xearth
 
-MAINTAINER=	mexas@bristol.ac.uk
+MAINTAINER=	mexas@bris.ac.uk
 COMMENT=	Set the root window to the image of earth
 
 USE_XORG=	x11 xext sm ice xt

Modified: head/math/slatec/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/math/slatec/Makefile	Tue Jul 16 12:04:09 2013	(r323100)
+++ head/math/slatec/Makefile	Tue Jul 16 12:15:05 2013	(r323101)
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ DISTFILES=	guide:slatec slatec_chk.tgz:s
 DIST_SUBDIR=	slatec
 EXTRACT_ONLY=	slatec_src.tgz slatec_chk.tgz
 
-MAINTAINER=	mexas@bristol.ac.uk
+MAINTAINER=	mexas@bris.ac.uk
 COMMENT=	SLATEC Common Mathematical Library
 
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes

Modified: head/textproc/urlview/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/urlview/Makefile	Tue Jul 16 12:04:09 2013	(r323100)
+++ head/textproc/urlview/Makefile	Tue Jul 16 12:15:05 2013	(r323101)
@@ -1,10 +1,5 @@
-# ex:ts=8
-# Ports collection makefile for:  urlview
-# Date created:			  21 April 1998
-# Whom:				  Josh Gilliam <josh@quick.net>
-#
+# Created by: Josh Gilliam <josh@quick.net>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	urlview
 PORTVERSION=	0.9
@@ -17,7 +12,7 @@ MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.mutt.org/mutt/co
 		ftp://ftp.gwdg.de/pub/unix/mail/mutt/international/contrib/ \
 		http://seis.bris.ac.uk/~mexas/
 
-MAINTAINER=	mexas@bristol.ac.uk
+MAINTAINER=	mexas@bris.ac.uk
 COMMENT=	URL extractor/launcher
 
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
